prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约 57047→48530→48276→70602→48131，整体呈波动走势；2024 年因河南首年新高考改革出现位次大幅后移至 70602，2025 年迅速回弹至 48131，近 3 年基准位次约 48131 名；该校在河南理科/物理类招生计划：2021 年 39 人、2022 年 37 人、2023 年 38 人、2024 年 65 人、2025 年 72 人；2026 年计划增至 83 人，较 2025 年扩招约 15.3%，扩招幅度明显，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 内蒙古大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 114 名，近年排名在 113–120 之间波动，整体稳定；该校在声誉舆情文件中未出现，无明显正面或负面声誉事件；抖音热度排名第 101，评价为「一般」，综合热度约 10.5 万，短视频平台曝光度偏低，报考关注度处于中等偏下水平；历史投档异常文件中亦无该校断档记录；第五轮学科评估中内蒙古大学无 A- 及以上等级学科，优势学科不突出，对高分考生的吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业高度重合，可能吸引更多考生报考；河南省 2026 年高考报名总人数约 120 万，较 2025 年（约 90.7 万）大幅增长约 32%，按近年比例估算物理类考生约 73.4 万，竞争显著加剧；内蒙古大学位于呼和浩特市，距河南较远，属于跨省报考；该校在河南招生计划逐年增加，2026 年已扩至 83 人，但相对于河南庞大考生基数占比仍然很小，地域偏远的属性对部分考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026 年计划扩招约 15.3%、河南省考生总数大幅增长约 32%、工科专业热度持续高企以及学校层次稳定等因素，扩招虽部分缓解竞争，但考生总量激增和热门工科专业吸引力的叠加效应更为显著，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年基准小幅后移。预测最低位次约 52744 名，区间 52244–53244 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 57047→48530→48276→70602→48131, showing an overall fluctuating trend; in 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform in Henan, the ranking significantly dropped to 70602, but quickly rebounded to 48131 in 2025, with a baseline ranking of about 48131 in the past three years; the enrollment plan for this university in Henan for Science/Physics Category: 39 students in 2021, 37 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 65 in 2024, 72 in 2025; the plan for 2026 increases to 83 students, an expansion of about 15.3% compared to 2025, which is significant and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Inner Mongolia University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings is approximately 114th, fluctuating between 113 and 120 in recent years, overall stable; the university does not appear in reputation and public opinion files, with no significant positive or negative reputation events; its Douyin popularity ranking is 101st, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 105,000, indicating low exposure on short video platforms and below-average attention from applicants; there are no records of abnormal admissions in historical files; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Inner Mongolia University has no disciplines rated A- or above, with no outstanding advantageous disciplines, limiting its appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended, and they overlap significantly with the majors offered in the Physics Category at this university, potentially attracting more applicants; the total number of college entrance exam takers in Henan Province in 2026 is approximately 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 907,000), with an estimated 734,000 Physics Category takers based on recent proportions, leading to intensified competition; Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, far from Henan, making it a cross-province application; the university's enrollment plan in Henan has been increasing year by year, reaching 83 students in 2026, but it remains a very small proportion relative to the huge number of Henan takers, and the remote location may somewhat suppress some applicants' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, an enrollment expansion of about 15.3% in 2026, a significant increase of about 32% in the total number of Henan takers, sustained high popularity of engineering majors, and stable university level, although the expansion partially alleviates competition, the combined effect of the surge in total takers and the appeal of popular engineering majors is more significant. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 52744, with a range of 52244–53244.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 52244–53244, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (such as Computer Science and Electronic Information), and Tier 3 majors as a safety option; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 51000), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 53000), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety and Tier 2 majors as stable choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 5874→6902→6955→13056→7705, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend; in 2024, due to Henan's first year of the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking significantly dropped to 13056, but quickly rebounded to 7705 in 2025, with a baseline ranking of about 7705 in the recent 3 years; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Henan: 12 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 20 in 2024, 24 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 31, an expansion of about 29.2% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Inner Mongolia University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 114th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 113–120, overall stable; the university does not appear in reputation and public opinion files, with no significant positive or negative reputation events; its Douyin popularity ranking is 101, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 105,000, indicating low exposure on short video platforms and below-average application attention; there are no records of enrollment gaps in historical admission anomaly files; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Inner Mongolia University has no disciplines rated A- or above, with no prominent advantageous disciplines, limiting its appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese language/Chinese literature majors are socially recommended, law is in a wait-and-see state, journalism is clearly discouraged, and teacher training/education is in a wait-and-see state; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan college entrance examination is about 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 907,000), with an estimated 466,000 history category candidates based on recent proportions, leading to intensified competition; Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, far from Henan, making it a cross-province application; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts in Henan has been increasing year by year, reaching 31 in 2026, but it still accounts for a very small proportion relative to Henan's huge candidate base, and the remote location somewhat suppresses some candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 29.2%, the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of Henan candidates, the divergence in popularity of liberal arts majors, and the stable university level, the relatively large expansion can partially offset the competitive pressure from the surge in candidate numbers, but the increase in candidate numbers is more significant. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decline compared to the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is about 9153, with a range of 8653–9653.
